not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

task_not_found.title: Task not found
task_not_found.description: We couldn't find the task you're looking for. It might have been deleted.

buttons.breakdown_tooltip: Use AI to break this task into smaller subtasks

chat.empty_state_description: Feeling overwhelmed? Just tell me what's on your mind, and we'll break it down into a simple, manageable plan.
chat.footer_hint: Plan your project, one message at a time. AI may provide inaccurate info.

task_drawer.title: Task Details
task_drawer.description: View and edit the details of your task here.

instructions.title: Pomodoro Instructions
instructions.description: How to use the Pomodoro technique and maximize your focus.
instructions.origin_text: It was created by the Italian Francesco Cirillo in the late 80s. He used a tomato-shaped kitchen timer (pomodoro, in Italian) to organize his university studies.

practices.focus: Total Focus: During the Pomodoro cycle, concentrate only on the task. Eliminate all distractions.
practices.short_break: Short Breaks: At the end of each cycle, take a short break to stretch, drink water, and relax the mind.
practices.long_break: Long Breaks: After 4 full Pomodoro cycles, reward yourself with a long break to rest and recover mental energy.
practices.adapter: Adapt the Times: Not everyone works well with 25 minutes. Adjust the times in your account settings to match your pace!

delete_confirm.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete_confirm.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your task.

empty_state.title: All caught up. Enjoy the break!
empty_state.body: Your task list is empty for now. How about relaxing for a bit before starting something new?

footer.keyboard_hint: Type and press Ctrl + Enter to add a task

form.title: Manage your tasks with focus and simplicity.

otp.message_new: We noticed you're new! We've sent a 6-digit code to <0>{{email}}</0> to verify your email and start your setup.

errors.send_code: Error sending code. Please try again.
errors.verify_code: Invalid or expired code. Please check and try again.

menu_left.title: Sidebar Menu (Left)
menu_left.description: Here you find your filters (Today, Scheduled, Important) and all your custom projects.

menu_right.title: Quick Access (Right)
menu_right.description: Search, navigation, and your theme, language, and profile settings through your avatar.

task_list.title: Task Gestures
task_list.swipe_done: Swipe a task to the right to quickly mark it as completed.
task_list.swipe_delete: Swipe a task to the left to delete it instantly.

task_details.title: Task Possibilities
task_details.description: Click on a task to open details. You can add subtasks, complex notes, due dates, tags, URLs, and mark as important.

metadata.title: Paul, Your Task Assistant
metadata.description: Paul is a task assistant that helps you manage your tasks and stay organized.
